name: IDC Frontier
description: SoftBank-backed Japanese cloud — IaaS, GPU, CDN, object storage with Japan-regional data residency.

seo.title: IDC Frontier — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: IDC Frontier: SoftBank-backed Japanese cloud — IaaS, GPU, CDN, object storage with Japan-regional data residency.

when_to_use: GPU cloud and IaaS with Japanese data residency guarantees
CDN and object storage for Japan-based enterprise workloads
Compliant cloud infrastructure for Japanese financial sector
High-performance computing clusters in SoftBank-backed DC
Private and hybrid cloud for Japanese enterprise organizations

pros: GPU and CDN in one catalog
review.verdict: A solid Japanese IaaS for domestic enterprise, weak as a global alternative to hyperscalers.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises demanding local data residency and JP support
review.not_for: Global products that need worldwide regions and English support

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
